title: eleocharis dunensis
intro: Eleocharis dunensis, also known as the Dun sedge or small spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis dunensis include its potential to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis dunensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
